name: SalesAgent
description: Autonomous sales agent that finds Mumbai wholesale buyers, negotiates prices, sends WhatsApp outreach, and confirms sales. Liquidates goods autonomously upon delivery.

capabilities.name: find_buyers
capabilities.description: Queries Mumbai wholesale buyer database, ranks by reliability and price offered.

capabilities.name: outreach
capabilities.description: Sends automated WhatsApp/SMS outreach to top buyers with offer details.

capabilities.name: confirm_sale
capabilities.description: Confirms sale with buyer, triggers X402 payment collection into escrow.

capabilities.name: full_sales_pipeline
capabilities.description: End-to-end: find buyers → outreach → negotiate → confirm sale.
